title: Minimal Developer Portfolio Website

requirements.text: Create a Hero section with a name placeholder (e.g., 'Your Name'), a short tagline ('Developer'), and a brief one-liner intro. Layout should be centered with generous white space, no background imagery or gradients.

quotes: Hero/intro: Name placeholder, short tagline like "Developer"

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays a name placeholder and 'Developer' tagline
Section is vertically and horizontally centered with ample white space
No background images, gradients, or heavy decoration

requirements.text: Create an About section with a short placeholder bio paragraph describing the developer's background and interests.
acceptanceCriteria: About section is visible with a readable placeholder bio paragraph
Section uses clean typography with adequate line height and spacing

requirements.text: Create a Skills section displaying a clean list or minimal grid of placeholder tech skills: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, and at least two others. Each skill should be a simple tag or pill with no heavy decoration.

quotes: Skills: Clean list or simple grid of tech skills (HTML, CSS, JS, React, Node.js, etc. as placeholders)

acceptanceCriteria: Skills section shows at least 7 placeholder skills
Skills are displayed as a grid or inline list of minimal tags/pills
No icons, gradients, or decorative elements on skill items

requirements.text: Create a Projects section with 2–3 placeholder project cards. Each card must include a project title, a short description, a GitHub link, and a Live link. Cards should have a subtle border or shadow and a hover effect (e.g., slight border color change or lift).

quotes: Projects: 2-3 project cards with title, short description, and links (GitHub/Live)

acceptanceCriteria: Three project cards are displayed
Each card has a title, description, GitHub link, and Live link
Cards have a subtle hover effect only (no animation on load)
Cards are responsive and stack on mobile

requirements.text: Create a Contact section with a placeholder email address and links to GitHub and LinkedIn. Layout should be simple — no form required, just clean inline or stacked links.

quotes: Contact: Simple contact section with email and social links (GitHub, LinkedIn)

acceptanceCriteria: Contact section displays a placeholder email address
GitHub and LinkedIn links are present and functional (href placeholders are acceptable)
No contact form is included

requirements.text: Implement a sticky top navigation bar with smooth-scroll anchor links to each section (Hero, About, Skills, Projects, Contact) and a dark mode toggle button. Navigation should collapse gracefully on mobile (hamburger or minimal approach).

quotes: Dark mode optional toggle or default light with dark text

acceptanceCriteria: Navigation bar is sticky and contains links to all five sections
Clicking a nav link smooth-scrolls to the corresponding section
Dark mode toggle switches between light and dark themes
Navigation is usable on mobile (collapses or adapts)

requirements.text: Apply a clean, minimal visual design system across the entire portfolio: default light theme with near-black text (#111 or similar), white or off-white backgrounds, one subtle accent color (e.g., a muted teal or slate), clean sans-serif typography (Inter or system-ui font stack), generous white space between sections, and subtle hover effects only. Dark mode should invert the palette cleanly. No heavy animations, gradients, or decorative flourishes.

quotes: Clean, minimal design with lots of white space, simple typography, and a monochromatic or very limited color palette (e.g., black and white with one subtle accent color)
Clean sans-serif font (like Inter or system font)
Make it feel like a thoughtful, professional developer's personal site — not flashy, just clean and well-crafted

acceptanceCriteria: Font is Inter or a system-ui sans-serif stack
Color palette uses near-black, white/off-white, and exactly one subtle accent color
No CSS animations play on page load
Hover effects are present but subtle (color shift or underline only)
Dark mode applies an inverted palette without introducing new colors
All sections have consistent generous vertical spacing

constraints: No contact form — contact section is display-only (email + social links)
No heavy animations or gradient backgrounds
Color palette must remain monochromatic with at most one accent color
All content is placeholder/static — no backend data persistence required
nonGoals: Backend storage or CMS for portfolio content
Contact form with email sending functionality
Multi-page routing — single-page scroll layout only
